sql_array: CREATE TABLE bpel_processes (id INT, name VARCHAR(100));
UPDATE bpel_processes SET name = 'Updated Echo' WHERE id = 1;
SELECT * FROM bpel_processes WHERE name = 'Updated Echo';
CREATE PROCEDURE import_bpel_process() { DECLARE scp INT; BPEL.BPEL.import_script('file:/updated/bpel.xml', 'Updated Echo', scp); };
